problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: The key to Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? is Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus — specifically Deep brain stimulation — which would help 21,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
